If $x$ has $2$ two-digit multiples, then the smallest multiple of $x$ in this range will be $10$ or more and the largest will be $99$ or less. Let's denote the smallest two-digit multiple by $mx$ and the largest by $nx$, where $m$ and $n$ are integers. Then we have $10 \leq mx \leq 99$ and $10 \leq nx \leq 99$.
